mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token (user_id, token_hash, expires_at, created_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{hash}, #{expiresAt}, 'system')
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked FROM refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{hash} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked = 1 WHERE token_hash = #{hash} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = 0 AND deleted = 0
